name: Carbide Grey Warp Loader
description: Call into action your carbide grey warp loader, and bulldoze your way through life faster.

name: Excavating Vacuum Suit
description: Summon forth your excavating vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.

name: Cosmic Predator
description: Call into action your cosmic predator, another deadly imperial warmachina adapted for use in the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

name: Cosmic Armored Weapon Beta
description: Call into action your cosmic armored weapon beta. Further enhanced for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, as its cheery new color scheme would attest.

name: Interstellar Leafkin
description: Summon forth your interstellar leafkin, and ride it boldly where no leafkin has gone before.

name: スターライトスレイ
description: スターライトスレイに騎乗する。 星芒祭で作られた大型のソリ。トナカイ付き

name: Wings of Nihility
description: Manifest your wings of nihility. Their unsettling, tendriled form exudes the bottomless obsession of a voidsent sovereign.

name: Rocket Punch
description: Call into action your rocket punch. A ridable rocket that takes the form of a fist─or vice versa, depending on one's philosophy.

name: Wings of Legacy
description: Manifest your wings of legacy, a spirit of legend said to favor the strong.

name: Inflatable Mograft
description: Summon forth your inflatable mograft, a flotation device designed with both relaxation and safety in mind.

name: Alexandrian Axe Beak
description: Summon forth your Alexandrian axe beak, a reptilian bird favored of the merchant Rowena. Not to be confused with the beast native to Thanalan.

name: Alsvid
description: Summon forth Alsvid, a unicorn whose rainbow hair makes it the rarest of its kind─a veritable unicorn among unicorns.

name: Royal Magicked Carpet

sources.text: Trisassant - Old Sharlayan - 100 Pieces of Corvosi Brass

description: Summon forth your royal magicked carpet, and set forth to see the world shining, shimmering, splendid.

name: Hardy-Daytona
description: Call into battle your Hardy-Daytona, a lore-bending battlebike that will have you feeling as though you were playing a minigame.

name: Genie of the Lamp
description: Summon forth your genie of the lamp. Not the actual being of legend so cannot grant wishes─unless your wish is to be carried somewhere.

name: Alert Red Warp Loader
description: Call into action your alert red warp loader, and bulldoze your way through life faster.

name: Rapid-fab Vacuum Suit
description: Summon forth your rapid-fab vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.

name: Cosmic Armored Weapon
description: Call into battle your cosmic armored weapon, a deadly imperial warmachina-turned-handy (leggy?) exploration vehicle.

name: Volatile Gravity Vacuum Suit
description: Summon forth your volatile gravity vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.

name: Cosmic Countenance
description: Summon forth your cosmic countenance, a Loporrit-designed defense system that serves with a smile─albeit an unsettling one.

name: Turali Snowman
description: Summon forth your Turali snowman, and frolic as only Ryoqor Terteh can.

name: Wings of Mist
description: Manifest your wings of mist. Their eldritch aura exudes an unstoppable resolve.

name: Uolon
description: Summon forth your uolon, a great big beast that tends the forest with a great big grin.

name: Lowrider T1RANT
description: Call into battle your Lowrider T1RANT, and rule the roads with an iron fist (around the custom leather-bound steering wheel).

name: Dynamite
description: Summon forth your dynamite, a soulkin favored of the merchant Rowena. House-trained and should therefore not explode in a fiery conflagration.

name: Wanyudo
description: Summon forth your wanyudo, and hold on for dear life as the nightmare rolls on.

name: Ornamental Shrublet
description: Summon forth your ornamental shrublet. Seeks either revenge or proliferation or both on its way to a new land.

name: Pilgrim's Protector

sources.text: Pilgrim's Traverse - Sack of First Light

description: Summon forth the pilgrim's protector, a wandering worshiper's best friend.

name: Chandelier of First Light
description: Summon forth your chandelier of First Light, and live like tomorrow doesn't exist. Like it doesn't exist.

name: Felyne Support Team Cart
description: Summon forth your Felyne support team cart, safe in the knowledge that there is no reward penalty for riding it.

name: Seikret
description: Summon forth your Seikret, the steed of choice for serious hunters.

name: Ambulario
description: Summon forth your Ambulario, and ride in the delightfully fiendish spirit of All Saints' Wake.

name: Forgiven Mimicry

sources.text: Pilgrim's Traverse - Sack of First Light

description: Summon forth your forgiven mimicry. Not actually a sin eater, so it can be ridden without fear of turning those around you into one.

name: Vurgar the Loyal
description: Summon forth Vurgar the Loyal, and give your enemies twenty seconds to comply.

name: Cosmoboard
description: Deploy your cosmoboard, and shred up the cosmos (figuratively) wherever you go.

name: Interstellar Dhalmel
description: Summon forth your interstellar dhalmel, and ride it boldly where no dhalmel has gone before.

name: Warp Loader
description: Call into action your warp loader, and bulldoze your way through life.

name: Wings of Death
description: Manifest your wings of death. Their somber hue exudes a sense of impending doom.

name: Yan
description: Summon forth your yan, a sheep spirit whose disarmingly adorable appearance belies its tremendous might.

name: Shagcoat Cat
description: Summon forth your shagcoat cat, a gigantic-yet-gentle feline with a penchant for sporting a blue bow tie.

name: Petalodus
description: Summon forth your petalodus, an ambulatory shark that thinks of you as a friend, not food.

name: Demon Haul

sources.text: A Fork to Be Reckoned With I

description: Summon forth your demon haul, a dreaded guardian-turned-mode of transport.

name: Ancient Airship
description: Summon your ancient airship, a magic-propelled vessel capable of bearing you and three companions.

name: Branchbearer

sources.text: Veerul Ja - Gok Golma (Yak T'el) - 18 Mamool Ja Nanook (Rank 4)

description: Summon forth your branchbearer. If it looks like a bird, flies like a bird, and cries like a bird, then it...could be a predatorial seedkin disguised as a bird.

name: Hovering Hot Pot
description: Summon forth your hovering hot pot. Formerly a ritual cauldron, it now soars the skies while simmering with scrumptious morsels.

name: High Mobility Vacuum Suit
description: Summon forth your high mobility vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.

name: Vacuum Suit
description: Summon forth your vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.

name: Magitek Slasher
description: Call into battle your magitek slasher. Has been stripped of its blades and is therefore safe to ride.

name: Wings of the Knighthood
description: Manifest your wings of the knighthood. Their vibrant red hue exudes the passion of a dutiful knight.

name: His Royal Headness on Parade
description: Summon forth His Royal Headness on Parade, that all may bask in the splendor of a well-formed noggin.

name: Eggeater
description: Summon forth your eggeater, an anteater raised on a luxurious diet of eggs.

name: Air-wheeler C9
description: Summon forth your air-wheeler C9, and turn heads all over Solution Nine.

name: Dais of Darkness

sources.text: Uah'shepya - Solution Nine - 75 Clouddark Demimateria II

description: Summon forth your dais of Darkness. Will not vanish beneath your feet after a set duration.

name: Shroud of Darkness

sources.text: Uah'shepya - Solution Nine - 99 Clouddark Demimateria I

description: Summon forth your shroud of Darkness, a lingering sliver of the Cloud of Darkness's eldritch raiment.

name: Snowstreamer
description: Summon forth your snowstreamer. Guaranteed not to inconveniently melt while you are inside.

name: Brachiosaur

sources.text: Ryubool Ja - Tuliyollal - 3,200 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon forth your brachiosaur, a rare prehistoric creature sighted in frontier lands.

name: Venturous Kamuy
description: Summon forth your venturous kamuy, blessed wolf who shall not be bound by such corporeal laws as gravity or aerodynamics.

name: Wings of Eternity
description: Manifest your wings of eternity. Their luminous green hue exudes the determination of a recreated queen.

name: Punutiy
description: Summon forth your punutiy, and delight onlookers to no end with its winsome charm.

name: Barreltender

sources.text: Splendors Vendor - Solution Nine - 100 Mount Tokens (100,000 Orange Gatherer's Scrips)

description: Summon forth your barreltender, a sabotender possessed of a hulking frame that has earned it its name.

name: Qeziigural

sources.text: Uah'shepya - Solution Nine - 3 Twilight Gemstones (Cenote Ja Ja Gural or Vault Oneiron)

description: Summon forth your qeziigural, a winged golem whose name means “gold that flies” in the Mamool Ja tongue.

name: Monowheel S1
description: Summon forth your monowheel S1, a bold vehicle fit for a champion of the Arcadion.

name: Mountain Zu
description: Summon forth your mountain zu, and make ready to quench your thirst for adventure.

name: Automatoise

sources.text: Ryubool Ja - Tuliyollal - 3,200 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon forth your automatoise, a weapon of war developed in Origenics.

name: Ullr
description: Summon forth Ullr, a dragon on the hunt for a musical collaboration.

name: Rroneek

sources.text: Splendors Vendor - Solution Nine - 100 Mount Tokens (100,000 Orange Gatherer's Scrips)

description: Summon forth your rroneek. As your trusty steed, this creature can look forward to living to a ripe old age.

name: Mehwapyarra

sources.text: Uah'shepya - Solution Nine - 12 Ttokrrone Scales (FATE "The Serpentlord Seethes" - Shaaloani)

description: Summon forth your mehwapyarra. As dutiful as it is laid-back.

name: Outrunner
description: Summon forth your outrunner, a rotund machine built by the Alexandrians.

name: Wings of Resolve
description: Manifest your wings of resolve. Their deep-blue hue exudes the burden of a lost man.

name: Wings of Ruin
description: Manifest your wings of ruin. Rest assured they won't bring destruction wherever they go.

name: Air-wheeler A9
description: Summon forth your air-wheeler A9. The lights aren't merely for show and actually make it go.

name: Ty'aitya

sources.text: Edelina - Mor Dhona - 500 Turali Bicolor Gemstone Vouchers

description: Summon forth your ty'aitya. Though its kind is ordinarily only capable of gliding, no one has apparently told this fellow, who can fly indefinitely.

name: Alpaca
description: Summon forth your alpaca. Its foul spit is outweighed by its cuteness and utility. Mostly.

name: Oppressor
description: Summon your oppressor mount, a weapon of war-turned-conveyance of comfort.

name: Ark
description: Summon forth your Ark, a bipedal warmachina disguised as an airship─or an airship disguised as a bipedal warmachina, if you prefer.

name: Torgal
description: Summon forth Torgal, a trusty hound inspired by the trusty hound inspired by the memories of the actual trusty hound.

name: UFO
description: Summon forth your UFO, and experience the sensation of an alien abduction.

name: Quaqua
description: Summon forth your quaqua, a familiar hailing from the south sea isles that has either a permanent snarl or grin, depending on one's outlook on life.

name: Spectral Statice
description: Summon forth your spectral Statice, an avatar of the mischief-loving faerie from Aloalo Island.

name: Rhiyes
description: Summon forth your Rhiyes, a vibrantly hued mechanical rhinoceros that can't say no to terrorizing the Beans of Blunderville.

name: Island Adenium
description: Summon forth your island adenium. Literally a desert rose by another name, and doesn't have much of a scent to brag about.

name: Island Peerifool
description: Summon forth your island Peerifool. If anyone asks, it bears no relation whatsoever to a certain malicious rotting vegetable.

name: Peatie
description: Summon forth Peatie, a goobbue maiden with a soft spot for peach blossoms.

name: Garlond GL-IIT
description: Summon forth your Garlond GL-IIT, a magitek vehicle equipped with a tiller, and cultivate your isle in style.

name: Sabotender de la Luna
description: Summon forth your sabotender de la luna mount, a prodigious cactuar raised on a diet of rousing tales.

name: Lynx of Abyssal Grief
description: Summon forth your lynx of abyssal grief, which could be what a certain dread voidsent born in the depths of the moon might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Crescent Moon
description: Summon forth your crescent moon mount. By all accounts more comfortable to perch upon than one shaped like a full moon.

name: Apocryphal Bahamut
description: Summon forth your apocryphal Bahamut, an embodiment of the fallen wyrm's burning desire to be free...and apparently carry you on a sofa.

name: Rising Phoenix
description: Summon forth your Rising Phoenix, a symbol of rebirth and gratitude both.

name: Shishioji
description: Summon forth Shishioji, a prince who just can't wait to be king (again).

name: Burabura Chochin
description: Summon forth your burabura chochin, a kindred spirit in wandering.

name: Garlond GL-IS
description: Summon forth your Garlond GL-IS. Fitted with a sidecar to carry a trusty sidekick.

name: Island Buffalo
description: Summon forth your island buffalo. Tough on the outside but tender on the inside.

name: Lynx of Fallen Shadow
description: Summon forth your lynx of fallen shadow, which is what a certain knight in black might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Magicked Children's Bed
description: Summon forth your magicked children's bed, and enjoy the carefree sleep of a child wherever you go.

name: Shadow Wolf
description: Summon forth your shadow wolf, a nightmare creature that could only be dreamed up by the darkest of souls.

name: Megaloambystoma
description: Summon forth your megaloambystoma. Or should that be *max*olotl? You decide.

name: Island Mandragora Queen
description: Summon forth your island Mandragora Queen, a well-cultivated vegetable fit for a king.

name: Island Tomato King
description: Summon forth your island Tomato King, a sovereign who rules with a strong and juicy─er, just hand.

name: Island Garlic Jester
description: Summon forth your island Garlic Jester, a mandragora as pungent as it is humorous.

name: Traveling Supporter
description: Summon forth your traveling supporter. Proof that there is nothing a pair of bunny ears can't improve.

name: Moon-hopper

sources.text: Coiningway - Hoper's Hold (Mare Lamentorum) - 18 Loporrit Carats (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth the moon-hopper. Guaranteed to instill a sense of well-being within all those in earshot.

name: Aeturna
description: Summon forth the aeturna, an imposing feline that boasts far more than the standard nine lives.

name: Orthos Craklaw
description: Summon forth your Orthos craklaw. May or may not have participated in famous battles which actually took place in history.

name: Island Alligator
description: Summon forth your island alligator. Demands to be seen not later, but always.

name: Chrysomallos
description: Summon forth Chrysomallos, the golden ram of legend─though legend doesn't seem to say anything about illusory coins spilling forth endlessly...

name: Magitek Avenger G1
description: Call into battle your magitek avenger G1, an imperial warmachina made gaudier by goblin hands.

name: Lynx of Righteous Fire
description: Summon forth your lynx of righteous fire, which could be what a certain honor-bound archfiend might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Pinky

sources.text: Nesvaaz - Radz-at-Han - 3 Bottles Of Exciting Tonic (The Excitatron 6000 - Gold Chests)

description: Summon forth Pinky, an elephantine machine engineered to enrapture.

name: Phaethon

sources.text: Nesvaaz - Radz-at-Han - 3 Burning Horns (The Shifting Gymnasion Agonon - Gold Chests)

description: Summon forth fiery Phaethon, a legendary beast of Corvosi myth.

name: Blackjack
description: Summon forth the *Blackjack*, or rather, its scale prototype. Exactly where inside it you ride is a mystery best left unanswered.

name: Anden III
description: Summon forth Anden III. It has a mouth, but it cannot scream.

name: Set of Ceruleum Balloons
description: Summon forth your set of ceruleum balloons. Propulsion not included.

name: Magicked Parasol
description: Summon forth your magicked parasol, and have the whole world at your feet.

name: Magicked Umbrella
description: Summon forth your magicked umbrella to whisk you off your feet in the most delightful way.

name: Logistics Node
description: Call into battle your Allagan logistics node. For your safety and the safety of those around you, all weaponry has been disabled.

name: Silkie
description: Summon forth your silkie mount. Because cleanliness is next to cuteness.

name: Sil'dihn Throne
description: Summon forth your Sil'dihn throne. Once seating the rulers of Sil'dih, it now serves as your personal mode of transport.

name: Miw Miisv

sources.text: N-0598 - A-4 Research (Ultima Thule) - 18 Omicron Omnitokens (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth Miw Miisv, living proof that hope springs eternal─and in unexpected shapes.

name: Island Eggplant Knight
description: Summon forth your island Eggplant Knight, an oversized vegetable embodiment of chivalry.

name: Island Onion Prince
description: Summon forth your island Onion Prince, a vegetable whose colossal size befits his station.

name: Island Mandragora
description: Summon forth your island mandragora, a prime piece of island produce.

name: Garlond GL-II
description: Summon forth your Garlond GL-II. For those who've got a nice place─who never wanted to be anybody else.

name: Lynx of Imperious Wind
description: Summon forth your lynx of imperious wind, which could be what a certain tempestuous archfiend might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Sunforged
description: Summon forth your sunforged. Its searing flames consume all─with the exception of its owner, thankfully.

name: Starlight Steed
description: Summon forth your Starlight steed, which, despite being an illusion, can bring very real joy to one and all.

name: Wondrous Lanner
description: Summon forth your wondrous lanner, a proud bird with a fondness for fantastical tales.

name: Fylgja
description: Summon forth Fylgja, a dragon with a soft spot for heroes and songs.

name: Mechanical Lotus
description: Summon forth your mechanical lotus, a flower-shaped mode of transport with a spiritual aura.

name: Hippo Cart
description: Summon forth your hippo cart, a mean if not so lean transporting machine.

name: Megashiba
description: Summon forth your megashiba mount─fluffy, living proof that massive can still be adorable.

name: Bluefeather Lynx
description: Summon forth your bluefeather lynx mount, which could be what a certain feathered familiar might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Vinegaroon

sources.text: J'lakshai (Old Sharlayan) / Wilmetta (Radz-at-Han) - 3,200 Sacks Of Nuts

description: Summon forth your vinegaroon mount, a carnivorous scalekin with a jaw reminiscent of claws.

name: Troll
description: Summon forth your troll mount, a gentle giant native to the northern seas.

name: Pod 602
description: Summon forth your pod 602 mount. May leave you hanging, but will never let you go. Unless it malfunctions, or runs out of energy, or...you get the idea.

name: Alkonost

sources.text: Nesvaaz - Radz-at-Han - 3 Resplendent Feathers (The Excitatron 6000 or The Shifting Gymnasion Agonon)

description: Summon forth your alkonost, an imposing antlered avian native to northern Ilsabard.

name: Demi-Phoinix
description: Summon forth Demi-Phoinix. Because four wings are better than two and three heads better than one.

name: Porxie King
description: Summon forth your porxie king. Smells like bacon that's a cut above the rest─though that might just be an effect of the crown.

name: Wivre

sources.text: Edelina - Mor Dhona - 500 Bicolor Gemstone Vouchers

description: Summon forth your wivre, a mighty horned beast said to be nature's battering ram.

name: Papa Paissa
description: Summon forth Papa Paissa. It's for a good cause.

name: Level Checker

sources.text: Nesvaaz - Radz-at-Han - 12 Chi Bolts (FATE "Omicron Recall: Killing Order" - Ultima Thule)

description: Summon forth your level checker, a mysterious machine that can determine your strength...and apparently also shrink and carry you inside it.

name: Victor
description: Summon forth Victor, a dog to rule over all dogs─at dog shows, that is.

name: Calydontis
description: Summon forth Calydontis. He's wild but he's yours.

name: Dreadnaught
description: Summon forth your dreadnaught, a hulking machina that's equally at home on the battlefield as it is at construction sites.

name: Argos
description: Summon forth Argos, Venat's faithful familiar, to bear you places while you marvel at the softness of his golden coat.

name: Lynx of Divine Light
description: Summon forth your lynx of divine light, which could be what a certain will of the star might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Lynx of Eternal Darkness
description: Summon forth your lynx of eternal darkness, which could be what a certain eldest of all primals might look like as a large, winged feline.

name: Arion
description: Summon forth Arion, the heavenly steed of unmatched swiftness.

name: Al-iklil
description: Summon forth Al-iklil, a stylish hovering craft designed to carry up to two riders. Any more and it may not heed you.

name: Deinonychus
description: Summon forth your deinonychus. Cleverer than the average prehistoric carnivore.

name: Magicked Card

sources.text: The Adventurer with All the Cards

description: Summon forth your magicked card to take you wonder by wonder, over, sideways, and under.

name: Antelope Stag
description: Summon forth your antelope stag, a male creature identifiable by its horns, striped body, and...impressive size.

name: Antelope Doe
description: Summon forth your antelope doe, a female creature identifiable by the bluish tinge of its fur.

name: Cruise Chaser
description: Summon forth your Cruise Chaser to cruise along in style as you give chase to your foes.

name: Landerwaffe
description: Summon forth Landerwaffe, magnificent mechanical dragon of legend, and be the envy of all the other kids.

name: Resplendent Vessel of Ronka
description: Summon forth the Resplendent Vessel of Ronka. Just like the Great Vessel of Ronka, but really shiny.

name: Gilded Mikoshi
description: Summon forth your squad of gilded Namazu to bear you upon a gilded mikoshi─all of which is as gaudy as it sounds.

name: Polar Bear
description: Summon forth your polar bear, a gentle giant with a soft spot for sweets.

name: Diamond Gwiber
description: Summon forth your diamond gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Lunar Whale
description: Summon forth the Lunar Whale, which is definitely not an actual whale, but certainly large enough to warrant the name. Seats up to eight people, including the pilot.

name: Gabriel Mark III
description: Summon forth your Gabriel Mark III mount, though you may find this transforming warmachina is less than meets the eye. Claims that its gold paint deflects laser beams are entirely unfounded.

name: Cerberus
description: Summon forth your Cerberus mount. Be warned, however, that riding into a peaceful village on the back of a gigantic, slavering, three-headed hellhound may cause quite a stir among the locals.

name: Big Shell
description: Summon forth your big shell mount, which is ironically rather small. Still quite big for a crab, though.

name: Construct VI-S
description: Summon forth your Construct VI-S. Painted red so it goes faster. Theoretically.

name: Chocorpokkur
description: Summon forth a chocorpokkur, which is... Well, perhaps you had best see it for yourself.

name: Prototype Roader
description: Summon forth a prototype roader, one of the fastest ways to reach your destination while scaring the seven hells out of everyone on the way.

name: Emerald Gwiber
description: Summon forth your emerald gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Eden
description: Summon forth Eden, or rather, a considerably smaller version of the gargantuan entity.

name: Snowman
description: Summon forth a behatted and begloved embodiment of festive cheer.

name: Gabriel α
description: Summon forth your Gabriel α. Magic shield not included. Armaments for decorative purposes only.

name: Construct 14
description: Summon forth your Construct 14. Will dispose of friend and foe alike if so commanded, so be careful what you wish for.

name: Megalotragus
description: Summon forth your megalotragus, a herbivore so intimidating it puts carnivores to shame.

name: Incitatus
description: Summon forth Incitatus, an enchanted steed favored of the merchant Rowena. If it could talk, it would doubtless drive a hard bargain.

name: Ehll Tou
description: Summon forth Ehll Tou, the young dragon with a passion for crafting.

name: Magitek Hyperconveyor
description: Call into battle your magitek hyperconveyor, a modern-day improvement on ancient Allagan logistics.

name: Jibanyan Couch

sources.text: Yo-kai Watch Collaboration - Obtain 17 Yo-kai Weapons

description: Summon forth the Jibanyan couch. A mysterious piece of furniture designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Jibanyan.

name: Gwiber of Light
description: Summon forth your gwiber of light, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Rolling Tankard
description: Summon forth your Rolling Tankard, a mighty warmachina built by the blacksmiths of Watts's Anvil.

name: Chocobo Carriage
description: Summon forth your chocobo carriage to ferry your friends around in comfort.

name: Pteranodon
description: Summon forth your pteranodon, a winged scalekin that has existed since ancient times.

name: Albino Karakul
description: Summon forth your albino karakul, a black sheep among its kind. Which is to say it's white.

name: Dhalmel
description: Summon forth your dhalmel, a towering herbivore native to the Sea of Clouds.

name: Rubellite Carbuncle
description: Summon forth your Rubellite Carbuncle, an arcane entity given form by the mysteries of rubellite geometry.

name: Ramuh
description: Summon forth Ramuh. No, not that one. The one you fought in the Empty. But not the actual one.

name: Hybodus

sources.text: No More Fish in the Sea II

description: Summon forth your hybodus to ride the winds and menace the skies.

name: Ruby Gwiber
description: Summon forth your ruby gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Great Vessel of Ronka

sources.text: Yuqurl Manl - Hopl's Stopple (The Rak'tika Greatwood) - 18 Qitari Compliments (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth the Great Vessel of Ronka. Don't mind the contents.

name: Kingly Peacock
description: Summon forth your kingly peacock, an avian embodiment of nobility hailing from Othard.

name: Spriggan Stonecarrier
description: Summon forth your spriggan stonecarrier. Lives to carry ore, eggs, and you.

name: Menoetius
description: Summon forth Menoetius. Just like Epimetheus, but more comfortable.

name: Epimetheus
description: Summon forth Epimetheus, an unstoppable vehicle of war. Or at least it would be if it were bigger.

name: Construct VII

sources.text: One Steppe at a Time V

description: Summon forth your Construct VII. Rumors that it is heavily based on an Ivalician design are entirely unfounded. Well, almost.

name: Morbol
description: Summon forth your morbol. Strong vines, soft heart...middling stench.

name: Ufiti
description: Summon forth your ufiti. May carry you to high ground for your own safety.

name: Forgiven Reticence

sources.text: Xylle (The Crystarium) / Ilfroy (Eulmore) - 3,200 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon forth your forgiven reticence. The strong and silent type, so don't expect rousing conversation.

name: Shadow Gwiber
description: Summon forth your shadow gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Portly Porxie

sources.text: Jul Oul - Lydha Lran (Il Mheg) - 18 Fae Fancies (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth your portly porxie. Bears you places to the tantalizing smell of cured meats.

name: Magicked Bed

sources.text: Crafted by Carpenter - The Dungeons of Lyhe Ghiah

description: Summon forth your magicked bed, and dream a little dream of never needing to get up.

name: Skyslipper
description: Summon forth your skyslipper, the greatest mechanical marvel to ever resemble a shoe.

name: Battle Tiger
description: Summon forth your battle tiger, now with 100% more sharp things with which to terrorize your foes.

name: Amaro
description: Summon forth your amaro, Norvrandt's favorite beast of burden.

name: Sunspun Cumulus
description: Summon forth the sunspun cumulus. It is unclear whether its previous owner was a boy with a tail or simply a monkey.

name: Circus Ahriman
description: Summon forth your Circus ahriman, a voidsent bred by the Continental Circus.

name: Innocent Gwiber
description: Summon forth your innocent gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: Ironfrog Mover

sources.text: Fathard - Eulmore - 12 Formidable Cog (FATE "A Finale Most Formidable" - Kholusia)

description: Summon forth your ironfrog mover, a dwarven-made automaton.

name: Triceratops
description: Summon forth your triceratops seemingly from a page right out of prehistory.

name: Fae Gwiber
description: Summon forth your fae gwiber, a draconic arcane entity.

name: War Tiger
description: Summon forth your war tiger to tear the enemy's morale to shreds with its cruel, curved fangs.

name: Grani
description: Summon Grani, heroic steed from a realm not your own.

name: Demi-Ozma
description: Call into battle Demi-Ozma─the round mound of spellbound.

name: Magitek Avenger A1
description: Call into battle your magitek avenger A1─outfitted and optimized for alpine warfare.

name: Eurekan Petrel
description: Summon your Eurekan petrel, because who hasn't dreamed of gazing down upon all creation from the mantle of a windborne gastropod?

name: Regalia Type-G
description: Summon forth your Regalia Type-G, ceruleum-powered magitek transportation vehicle crafted by Garlond Ironworks.

name: Hallowed Kamuy
description: Summon your hallowed kamuy, noble wolf blessed by the azure auspice Seiryu.

name: Kamuy of the Nine Tails
description: Summon Kamuy of the Nine Tails, legendary auspice, completely independent from Kyubi of the Nine Tails.

name: Sabotender Emperador
description: Summon forth Sabotender Emperador and bask in his desert sun radiance.

name: Maxima Roader
description: Call into battle your maxima roader─many times mightier than the mightiest of magna roaders.

name: Magicked Carpet
description: Summon forth your magicked carpet. Fantasy will set you free. Finally.

name: Eldthurs
description: Summon forth your Eldthurs, named for a fiery giant who once ruled a realm of flame with his brothers.

name: Fat Black Chocobo
description: Summon forth your fat black chocobo and marvel at its flurry of pitch-dark plumage.

name: Magna Roader
description: Call into battle your magna roader and try not to think too hard on why it is called such.

name: Fatter Cat
description: Summon your fatter cat─fatter than a fat cat, obviously.

name: Magitek Sky Armor
description: Call into battle your magitek sky armor, state-of-the-art Garlean flight technology at an affordable price.

name: Model O
description: Call into battle your Model O, autonomous aerial transport device constructed in Omega's interdimensional manufactory.

name: Euphonious Kamuy
description: Summon your euphonious kamuy, noble wolf blessed by the scarlet auspice Suzaku.

name: SDS Fenrir
description: Call into battle the SDS Fenrir, a lore-bending battlebike that looks as if it was driven straight from an age unknown.

name: Indigo Whale
description: Summon forth a massive whale straight from the Indigo Deep. If only you could do this with fish as well.

name: Typhon
description: Summon forth Typhon, hideous voidsent aberration and standout employee at the Manderville Gold Saucer.

name: Rathalos
description: Summon forth your mighty Rathalos─a wyvern far, far from home.

name: Juedi
description: Summon Juedi, and jump straight to ludicrous speed.

name: Dodo
description: Summon forth your noble dodo─hopefully not the last one in existence.

name: Prototype Conveyor
description: Call into battle your prototype magitek conveyor, a modern-day improvement on ancient Allagan logistics.

name: Safeguard System
description: Call into battle your Allagan safeguard system. For your safety and the safety of those around you, all weaponry has been disabled.

name: Mikoshi

sources.text: Gyosho - Dhoro Iloh (The Azim Steppe) - 20 Namazu Koban (Rank 8)

description: Summon your team of Namazu bearers, carrying a garish mikoshi upon which to precariously perch as they waddle to your destination.

name: Magitek Conveyor
description: Call into battle your magitek conveyor, a modern-day improvement on ancient Allagan logistics.

name: Lunar Kamuy
description: Summon forth the lunar kamuy, noble wolf blessed by the Lady of the Moon.

name: Red Hare
description: Summon forth the Red Hare─legendary steed known for both its unmatchable speed and its fiery red coat.

name: Tyrannosaur
description: Summon forth your tyrannosaur and experience firsthand a lost time when scalekin ruled the world.

name: Air Force
description: Call into battle Air Force, a flying weapon of masculine destruction somehow smuggled from Omega's Sigmascape.

name: Broken Heart (left)
description: Summon forth your broken heart─a magicked chair representing the left half of a Valentione's Day heart.

name: Broken Heart (right)
description: Summon forth your broken heart─a magicked chair representing the right half of a Valentione's Day heart.

name: True Griffin

sources.text: Madhura - Castellum Velodyna (The Fringes) - 18 Ananta Dreamstaves (Rank 8)

description: Summon forth your true griffin, a noble winged beast native to the hidden reaches of Abalathia's Spine.

name: Marid

sources.text: Madhura - Castellum Velodyna (The Fringes) - 18 Ananta Dreamstaves (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth your marid, trained by the Ananta and outfitted with a magicked carpet allowing for flight.

name: Magitek Death Claw
description: Call into battle your magitek death claw, an imperial warmachina based on ancient Allagan technology.

name: Auspicious Kamuy
description: Summon forth the auspicious kamuy, blessed wolf who shall not be bound by such corporeal laws as gravity or aerodynamics.

name: Nezha Chariot
description: Summon forth your Nezha chariot and travel the skies like a god.

name: Citrine Carbuncle
description: Summon forth your Citrine Carbuncle, an arcane entity given form by the mysteries of citrine geometry.

name: Aquamarine Carbuncle
description: Summon forth your Aquamarine Carbuncle, an arcane entity given form by the mysteries of aquamarine geometry.

name: Korpokkur Kolossus
description: Summon forth your korpokkur kolossus, a veritable colossus among its kind.

name: Magitek Avenger
description: Call into battle your magitek avenger, an imperial warmachina made mightier by goblin hands.

name: Flying Chair
description: Summon forth a flying chair to bear you in high style.

name: Striped Ray

sources.text: Shikitahe - Tamamizu (The Ruby Sea) - 12 Kojin Sango (Rank 8)

description: Summon forth your striped ray, a majestic creature native to the Ruby Sea.

name: Legendary Kamuy
description: Summon forth the legendary kamuy, blessed wolf who shall not be bound by such corporeal laws as gravity or aerodynamics.

name: Starlight Bear
description: Summon forth your Starlight bear, and delight the younglings to no end.

name: Mystic Panda
description: Summon forth your mystic panda. From Doma. From a thousand years ago.

name: Managarm

sources.text: Calamity Salvager - 8 Gold Chocobo Feathers (Recruit a Friend Campaign)

description: Summon forth Managarm, a legendary hound said to dwell in the hidden depths of Abalathia's Spine.

name: Falcon
description: Call into battle the *Falcon*, (unofficially) the fastest single-rider airship ever built in Eorzea.

name: Alte Roite
description: Summon forth Alte Roite, fantastical ur-being generated by Omega within the Deltascape.

name: Ixion

sources.text: Eschina - Rhalgr's Reach - 12 Ixion Horns (FATE "A Horse Outside" - The Lochs)

description: Summon forth mighty Ixion, legend of the Gyr Abanian highlands.

name: Syldra
description: Summon forth Syldra. Even in death, she would want to help.

name: Centurio Tiger
description: Summon forth your Centurio tiger, one mark the Clan actually does not want seen slain.

name: Yol

sources.text: In the Footsteps of Bardam the Brave

description: Summon forth your yol, proof of your recognition by the Azim Steppe Xaela as a true warrior.

name: Battle Panther
description: Summon forth your battle panther, fully armored to protect the stealthy beast from the occasional poison dart, poison arrow, poison-tipped spear, poison spell, and any poison words directed its way.

name: Battle Bear
description: Summon forth your battle bear, fully armored to protect the savage beast from singeing its lustrous fur on the smoldering carnage left in its wake.

name: Battle Lion
description: Summon forth your battle lion, fully armored to protect the majestic beast from the dangers of close combat.

name: Magitek Predator
description: Call into battle your magitek predator, and have you some fun.

name: Reveling Kamuy
description: Summon forth your reveling kamuy, blessed wolf who shall not be bound by such corporeal laws as gravity or aerodynamics.

name: Blissful Kamuy
description: Summon forth your blissful kamuy, blessed wolf who shall not be bound by such corporeal laws as gravity or aerodynamics.

name: Lone Faehound
description: Summon forth your lone faehound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.

name: Pack Faehound
description: Summon forth your pack faehound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.

name: Pack Hellhound
description: Summon forth your pack hellhound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.

name: Lone Hellhound
description: Summon forth your lone hellhound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.

name: Archon Throne
description: Summon forth your Archon throne. Don't call it a high chair.

name: Eggshilaration System
description: Call into battle your eggshilaration system. Egg puns required for propulsion.

name: Raigo
description: Summon forth Raigo. Whether or not he heeds the call depends entirely on the number of bloodied laurels in your crown.

name: Firebird
description: Summon forth your Firebird. Not Phoenix. Definitely not Phoenix.

name: Demonic Lanner
description: Summon forth your Demonic lanner─a symbol of justice for the Zurvan-worshipping races which once thrived on the southern continent of Meracydia.

name: Ginga
description: Summon forth Ginga. A man-made aberration from a land that exists only in whispers. Its name is said to mean “silver fang.”

name: Goten
description: Summon forth Goten. A man-made aberration from a land that exists only in whispers. Its name is said to mean “roaring heavens.”

name: Flying Cumulus
description: Summon forth the flying cumulus. It is unclear whether its previous owner was a boy with a tail or simply a monkey.

name: Arrhidaeus

sources.text: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator (Savage)

description: Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Oh, oh, oh, Arrhidaeus. Summon forth your Arrhidaeus.

name: Black Pegasus

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Gold Sack

description: Summon forth a black pegasus─winged horse of legend and bringer of death.

name: Sophic Lanner
description: Summon forth your Sophic lanner. A once faithful servant to a fickle goddess.

name: Whisper A-go-go

sources.text: Yo-kai Watch Collaboration - Obtain 13 Yo-kai Weapons

description: Summon forth the Whisper A-go-go. A flashy upgrade to a small flying vessel designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Whisper.

name: Disembodied Head
description: Summon forth your disembodied head. Not *your* disembodied head. *A* disembodied head. That's yours.

name: Whisper-go

sources.text: Yo-kai Watch Collaboration - Obtain 13 Yo-kai Minions

description: Summon forth the Whisper-go. A small, flying vessel designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Whisper.

name: Fat Moogle
description: Summon forth the fat moogle. How can he fly? Because magic. How can he fly bearing two riders? MAGIC.

name: Aerodynamics System

sources.text: In a Blaze of Glory V

description: Summon forth your aerodynamics system─marvel of ancient Allagan ingenuity.

name: Dark Lanner
description: Summon forth the dark lanner. Favored of Nidhogg, it fearlessly soars the skies of the Churning Mists.

name: Cloud Mallow

sources.text: Mogmul Mogbelly - Bahrr Lehs (The Churning Mists) - 200,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth a cloud mallow. It will carry you wherever the wind blows. Or, wherever you steer it.

name: Astrope

sources.text: I Hope Mentor Will Notice Me VI

description: Summon forth Astrope. A fully grown pegasus large enough to bear you and a companion across gentle skies.

name: Bennu
description: Summon forth the mythical bennu. Very few have had the privilege of viewing this bird up close.

name: Original Fat Chocobo
description: Summon forth the original fat chocobo. Of course, being the original, it can eat much more than its peers.

name: Gloria-class Airship
description: Summon forth the Gloria-class airship. This single-occupancy airship is a singular feat of engineering.

name: Warring Lanner
description: Summon forth the warring lanner. Favored of the primal Sephirot, it carries the seeds of the World Tree.

name: Round Lanner
description: Summon forth the round lanner. Favored of the primal King Thordan, he serves his master's knights dutifully.

name: Rose Lanner
description: Summon forth the rose lanner. Favored of the primal Ravana, his wings pierce the night sky like a blade of moonlight.

name: White Lanner
description: Summon forth the white lanner. Favored of the primal Bismarck, he soars the skies unchallenged.

name: Zu

sources.text: Spoils Collector - 1 Iron Voyage Spoil (Sea of Clouds Sector 24)

description: Summon forth your zu. Its weighty wings have carried it from the Near East.

name: Kongamato

sources.text: Vath Stickpeddler - Loth ast Vath (The Dravanian Forelands) - 200,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth your kongamato, raised with care by the Vath stickpeddler.

name: Wyvern
description: Summon forth your wyvern, master of the skies and forever-loyal servant.

name: Red Baron
description: Call into battle the Red Baron─Nero tol Scaeva's custom-made battle armor, now *your* custom-made battle armor.

name: White Devil
description: Call into battle the White Devil─Livia sas Junius's custom-made battle armor, now *your* custom-made battle armor.

name: Pegasus
description: Summon forth a pegasus─winged white horse of legend.

name: Sanuwa

sources.text: Luna Vanu - Ok' Gundu Nakki (The Sea of Clouds) - 200,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon forth your sanuwa, specially bred and trained for riding by Gundu merchant Luna Vanu.

name: Witch's Broom
description: Summon forth your witch's broom. Here is to hoping it refrains from “flipping you over, flip flip” while flying.

name: Gobwalker

sources.text: Alexander - The Burden of the Father (Savage)

description: Call into battle your gobwalker, a steam-powered war vehicle designed by the infamous Illuminati.

name: Twintania

sources.text: Calamity Salvager - 15 Gold Chocobo Feathers (Recruit a Friend Campaign)

description: Summon forth Twintania, an ancient wyvern who secretly dreams of freedom...and devouring you.

name: Amber Draught Chocobo

sources.text: Calamity Salvager - 8 Gold Chocobo Feathers (Recruit a Friend Campaign)

description: Summon forth your amber draught chocobo, a rare breed large and strong enough to bear two riders.

name: Black Chocobo
description: Summon de forth your black de chocobo.

name: War Panther

sources.text: But Somebody's Gotta Do It (Dark Knight)

description: Summon forth your war panther─a silent killer trained to maim anyone and everything...excepting you, of course.

name: Manacutter
description: Call into battle your manacutter, a single-rider airship constructed at the Garlond Ironworks.

name: Griffin
description: Summon forth your griffin─half eagle, half lion, all business.

name: Midgardsormr
description: Summon forth Midgardsormr, the slightly bigger one, but still not *the* big one.

name: Fenrir
description: Summon forth a purebred Abalathian hoarhound named after its pack's legendary leader.

name: Adamantoise
description: Summon forth your adamantoise mount. He(?) is actually quite faster than he appears.

name: Logistics System
description: Call into battle your Allagan logistics system. For your safety and the safety of those around you, all weaponry has been disabled.

name: Kirin
description: Summon forth Kirin, Far Eastern king of the beasts.

name: Ceremony Chocobo
description: Summon forth your ceremony chocobo, large enough to bear both you and your special someone.

name: Parade Chocobo
description: Summon forth your parade chocobo who, by the looks of him, has not marched in many parades.

name: Boreas
description: Summon forth Boreas, the legendary steed favored of the primal Shiva. His breath is said to beget the winter's storms.

name: Sleipnir
description: Summon forth Sleipnir─undying steed of the elder primal Odin. His coat is as dark as void, while his eyes glow a sanguine red.

name: Direwolf
description: Summon forth your deadly direwolf, one of five pups found huddling together in the snow near the corpse of their slain mother.

name: Markab
description: Summon forth Markab, the legendary steed favored of the primal Ramuh. It is said to have been born of a single thunderbolt.

name: Flame Warsteed

sources.text: A Line in the Sand IV

description: Summon forth your Immortal Flames-issued warhorse and try to push from your mind the fact that your chocobo is sitting somewhere hungry and alone.

name: Serpent Warsteed

sources.text: A Line in the Glade IV

description: Summon forth your Order of the Twin Adder-issued warhorse and try to push from your mind the fact that your chocobo is sitting somewhere hungry and alone.

name: Storm Warsteed

sources.text: A Line in the Storm IV

description: Summon forth your Maelstrom-issued warhorse and try to push from your mind the fact that your chocobo is sitting somewhere hungry and alone.

name: Draught Chocobo
description: Summon forth your draught chocobo, a massive bird large and strong enough to bear two riders.

name: Warbear
description: Summon forth your fearless warbear, veteran of a thousand battles, to fill your enemies with dread.

name: Warlion
description: Summon forth your fearless warlion to rule over the battlefield, such is his station as king of the beasts.

name: Enbarr
description: Summon forth Enbarr, the legendary steed favored of the primal Leviathan. It is said to have been born of the surging waves.

name: Gullfaxi
description: Summon forth Gullfaxi, the legendary steed favored of the primal Titan. Its powerful legs set off tremors that can be felt from malms away.

name: Xanthos
description: Summon forth Xanthos, the legendary steed favored of the primal Garuda. At full gallop, it is said to be the very wind itself.

name: Aithon
description: Summon forth Aithon, the legendary steed favored of the primal Ifrit. Its breath is said to be as hot as the seventh hell.

name: Bomb Palanquin

sources.text: Kobold Vendor - 789th Order Dig (Outer La Noscea) - 120,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon forth a bevy of bombs who will bear you in comfort upon a hovering palanquin.

name: Cavalry Elbst

sources.text: Sahagin Vendor - Novv's Nursery (Western La Noscea) - 120,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your cavalry elbst, raised from an egg by Pahh of Novv's Clutch.

name: Fat Chocobo
description: Summon forth your fat chocobo mount. Take care that there is sufficient room for his ample girth.

name: Nightmare
description: Summon forth the single-horned steed with a temperament as black as his coat.

name: Gilded Magitek Armor
description: Call into battle your gilded suit of magitek armor. Its golden coating serves to resist magicks while impressing members of the opposite sex.

name: Laurel Goobbue

sources.text: Sylphic Vendor - Little Solace (East Shroud) - 120,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your laurel goobbue, towering friend to the sylphs.

name: Cavalry Drake

sources.text: Amalj'aa Vendor - Ring of Ash (Southern Thanalan) - 120,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your cavalry drake, trained by the drake whisperer of the Brotherhood of Ash.

name: Behemoth
description: Summon your mighty behemoth, trained from birth to carry you...not trample you underfoot like an ant.

name: Unicorn
description: Summon forth the single-horned steed you befriended in the Black Shroud.

name: Ahriman
description: Summon forth a riding ahriman, bound to this realm with powerful magicks guaranteed to never fade.

name: Coeurl
description: Summon your fleet-footed battle coeurl, trained from a pup to recognize you as a friend...not food.

name: Magitek Armor
description: Call into battle your suit of Garlond Ironworks-modified magitek armor.

name: Legacy Chocobo
description: Five years and a realm-shaking Calamity were not enough to break the bonds between you and your loyal steed. A single whistle and he will be at your side once again.

name: Goobbue

sources.text: At level 30 or above, speak with the Wandering Minstrel in Eastern La Noscea (Final Fantasy XIV 1.0)

description: Use the odd-shaped horn gifted to you by the wandering minstrel to call a massive goobbue to your side.

name: Company Chocobo
description: Summon your Grand Company-issued battle chocobo.
